programme.title: Reba: Pilot

programme.title: Reba: The Honeymoon's Over or Now What?
programme.desc: Reba intervenes when she believes the high school is treating newlywed students unfairly.

programme.title: Reba: Someone's at the Gyno With Reba
programme.desc: Reba discovers that Cheyenne and Barbra Jean share the same gynocologist.

programme.title: Reba: You Make Me Sick
programme.desc: Cheyenne hides morning sickness from Van, and Reba's neighbour won't let Jake sleep over.

programme.title: Reba: The Steaks Are High
programme.desc: Reba agrees to host the football team's traditional pre-game dinner.

programme.title: Reba: The Man and the Moon
programme.desc: Brock turns into a jealous ex-husband when Reba calls a plumber to fix her kitchen faucet.

programme.title: Movie: Fit for a Prince
programme.desc: A promising seamstress designs dresses for a Charity Ball hoping to impress the royal guest. Though the dresses seem destined for disaster, the two still may manage to find their happily ever after.

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: The boys must embrace the latest fad to hit South Park Elementary or risk their status as the coolest kids in school.

programme.title: South Park: Butt Out
programme.desc: After singing and dancing representatives from an anti-smoking campaign rap about the dangers of smoking, the kids at South Park Elementary believe it to be cooler than the campaign, and take up the habit.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Bottom Bitch
programme.desc: Butters is determined to get his first kiss so his friends won't make fun of him anymore. Soon he's running his own ring of girls who will kiss for money and runs into trouble with some pimps.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Big Gay Al's Big Gay Boat Ride
programme.desc: When Stan discovers his new dog Sparky is gay, he becomes so confused he loses his will to play in the big Homecoming Football game against North Park. When Sparky runs away, Stan finds him at a sanctuary for homosexual animals.

programme.title: South Park: Free Hat
programme.desc: When the boys find out that their favourite movies are being enhanced, re-released and ruined in the process, they form a club to 'Save Films from their Directors.'

programme.title: South Park: South Park Is Gay!
programme.desc: The boys are hot to be gay once the metrosexual craze hits South Park. Meanwhile, Mr. Garrison accuses the Queer Eye guys of selling out.

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet
programme.desc: Scientologists converge on Stan's house after he is identified as the reincarnation of L. Ron Hubbard. One A-lister locks himself in the closet and refuses to come out, after Stan criticizes his 'talent.'

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too, living their dreams through surgery.

programme.title: South Park: The Cissy
programme.desc: Randy is harboring a giant secret and the pressure is getting to him. Meanwhile, Cartman calls Stan a cissy.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Iliza Shlesinger, Heidi Gardner & Jonathan Kimmel
programme.desc: Iliza Shlesinger questions an odd smell after a car wash, Heidi Gardner wants to hire a topless maid to get revenge on a rival, and Jonathan Kimmel provides forklift customer service.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium Isn't Free
programme.desc: Stan is addicted to the new Terrance and Phillip mobile game.

programme.title: South Park: Crippled Summer
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy head off to summer camp with all their handi-capable friends. When one of the camp counsellors, Towelie, falls off the wagon, the boys stage an intervention.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: City Sushi
programme.desc: Butters is diagnosed with multiple personality disorder. Meanwhile, the owner of City Wok is outraged when the town's newest business opens up next door.

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society
programme.desc: Bebe is the first girl in the fourth grade to 'develop.' Her new little breasts inspire a primate-like reaction from all the boys in class that threatens their friendship and society in general.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: The Red Badge of Gayness
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual re-enactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union. When they aren't satisfied with just the town, they move to take back the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland
programme.desc: When the entire contents of the world's imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he's seen a leprechaun.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II
programme.desc: After the wall in Imaginationland is blown up by terrorists, the evil side crosses over. Cartman tracks down Kyle and Stan at the Pentagon and demands Kyle makes good on their agreement. Meanwhile, U.S. troops cross over into Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode III
programme.desc: Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants
programme.desc: The kids of South Park have raised money to send to children of Afghanistan, but the Government believes the Afghani children's thank you gift is contaminated with Anthrax and the boys are forced to take it back to Afghanistan.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Greg Pikitis
programme.desc: Leslie enlists the help of Dave and Andy to help her catch a local teen vandal. Ann wants her Halloween party to be fun and gets help from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Tammy
programme.desc: Leslie learns the library department wants to take over her lot. The library is run by Ron's ex-wife Tammy who has a very strong hold over him still.

programme.title: Futurama: A Tale of Two Santas

programme.title: Futurama: Anthology of Interest II

programme.title: Futurama: Love and Rocket
programme.desc: Planet Express Ship's software is upgraded with a sexy female voice and Bender is in love.

programme.title: Futurama: Leela's Home World
programme.desc: After being threatened by the sewer mutants, Leela discovers the truth about her mysterious origins.

programme.title: Futurama: Where the Buggalo Roam
programme.desc: It's a buggalo bar-b-que on Mars when Amy brings her most recent boyfriend home.

programme.title: Futurama: A Pharoah to Remember
programme.desc: After delivering a sandstone block to Osiris 4, the crew is forced into slavery.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Love Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Roberta's new teacher, Ms. Eck, encourages Roberta to alter her appearance to teach her an important lesson. Cleveland Jr. befriends the disguised Roberta, only to fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Our Gang
programme.desc: Coach Cleveland comes to the rescue of frustrated parents by taking a group of delinquent teens under his wing. With the help of Cleveland Jr., he creates a new club dubbed The Crazy Eights, and hopes that it will keep the kids on the right track.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Buried Pleasure
programme.desc: Holt admits to Cleveland that he wishes he had a special someone in his life. Determined to help his lonely friend, Cleveland introduces Holt to the cat-loving redhead Jill. Meanwhile, Cleveland Jr. and Rallo anticipate the 'birth' of Rallo's pet fish.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Curious Case of Jr. Working at The Stool
programme.desc: A feud erupts between father and son when Cleveland Jr. gets a job at Cleveland's preferred bar and begins judging his father's drinking habits. Meanwhile, Roberta competes with the rich girl in school.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Once Upon a Tyne in New York
programme.desc: Cleveland and Donna take a road trip to the Big Apple for an overdue honeymoon, and to Donna's dismay, Cleveland allows the Stoolbend gang to tag along to help Coach McFall rekindle a long lost romance.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brown Knight
programme.desc: When Cleveland and Donna are mugged at an ATM, Cleveland is accidentally wounded in the tussle. By the time the story hits the local news, the attention goes to Cleveland's head, but Cleveland's version isn't the whole story.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Gone With the Wind
programme.desc: When Cleveland is diagnosed with high cholesterol, Donna puts him on a new high-fibre diet, which causes an intestinal backlash. It may stink up the place, but Cleveland quickly realizes his gas might score him points in the karaoke contest.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Acting as his brother's wingman, Rallo gives Cleveland Jr. a few pointers on how to win over the girl of his dreams, Chanel. Although when Cleveland Jr. finds out her boyfriend is local rap star Kenny West, he challenges Kenny to a rap battle.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brown History Month
programme.desc: Cleveland and Cleveland Jr. teach Donna and the kids their tradition of celebrating Black History Month. However, when Rallo learns about his heritage at school, he provokes Cleveland into a battle royale with his neighbour.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Doomsday
programme.desc: When a man is found murdered inside his supposedly impenetrable doomsday fallout shelter, the squad must figure out how and why he was targeted. Jane discovers Korsak is looking into retirement.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a wealthy woman with terminal cancer and only a few months left to live. Maura is torn between the doubts of her scientific mind and the instincts of her heart.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Couples' Cam: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Ashley and Anthony bring Vaeda home after a challenging birth experience; Jessica and Austin make a life changing decision; Keith has a secret.

programme.desc: Host Jamie Otis counts down the 25 most memorable moments from the Atlanta season.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Daniels Family: Episode 5
programme.desc: The Daniels Family reveal day episode; entertainment and technology solutions, to a surprise vacation.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Crazy Love
programme.desc: Upon realizing that Owen and Amelia have been seeing each other behind her back, Meredith comes down hard on her sister-in-law causing Amelia to rethink things.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: One Flight Down
programme.desc: A small plane crash in Seattle causes multiple casualties and brings back horrible memories for the doctors, especially Meredith and Arizona. Meanwhile, friction between Owen and Amelia makes for an uncomfortable working situation for Stephanie.

programme.title: The Closer: Grave Doubts
programme.desc: The body of a long-missing, young gang member is found.

programme.title: The Closer: Saving Face
programme.desc: At a retired cop's funeral, Provenza and Flynn discover something unexpected in the coffin.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: After finding another victim, Sharon angrily turns her attention back to former LAPD Det. Mark Hickman, who has a secret that may be a motive for murder. Meanwhile, the possible gang war ratchets up a notch with three more murders.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: As more information pours in about victims from the past, and how they tie to the murders of the present, Lt. Cooper and Amy Sykes get caught in an unexpected gun fight. Sharon finds leverage against Rev. Price, his attorney, and Mark Hickman.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: The conclusion of Hindsight ties all the threads of seven murders together as the video wire on Rev. Price elicits admissions from his younger brother, narrowing the field of suspects to three. Mark Hickman finally confronts the truth about his past.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Present Tense
programme.desc: The Major Crimes squad investigates the mysterious disappearance of a teenage girl, who vanished while volunteering at a homeless shelter. Meanwhile Buzz cracks open the decades old cold case file on the murder of his father and uncle.

programme.title: Major Crimes: N.S.F.W.
programme.desc: The murder of a Sex Crimes detective leads Major Crimes into the world of barely legal porn, where they find rampant drug use and questionable ethics. Meanwhile, Rusty's biological mother, Sharon Beck returns with some surprising news.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Money, Sons, and Guns
programme.desc: When an alarm goes off in an affluent Jupiter, Florida neighborhood, investigators must determine whether they're dealing with a suicide or something more sinister.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Love, Sex and Greed
programme.desc: Patrons are stunned when a man is gunned down at an Akron gas station, but investigators will be even more shocked when they uncover the four-way love affair behind the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Bad Cop
programme.desc: A former police officer stalked, assaulted, and attempted to seduce young women and was arrested while looking for sex with minor girls on internet chatrooms. He serves time but flees while out on parole.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: No Way Out
programme.desc: Authorities and the family of a young girl do not believe her when she tells them that she is being raped by her stepfather. A grudge fight escalates until one man shoots the other with three friends as witnesses.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Enemy Next Door
programme.desc: Kevin Patrick Stoeser is caught looking at lewd pictures in a halfway house following his release. Knowing this will put him back behind bars, he flees and has been on the run ever since.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Factory of Death
programme.desc: After blackmailing his Southern California employers about their illegal employment practices, an undocumented factory worker vanishes.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fighting for Life
programme.desc: A young father allegedly murders his parents in a haze of rage and drug addiction then abandons his child and flees to the American South.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Preaching Lies
programme.desc: The leader of the religious sect The River Road Fellowship, Victor Barnard is alleged to have collected ten young girls from his congregation into a group he names 'The Maidens.' When an escapee reports his abuse to the police, he is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Corsica's Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Josh hunts for the hidden treasure of Erwin Rommel, a Nazi general who plundered the wealth of North Africa as his tank corps fled the continent. The search brings Josh to never-explored underground lakes and undersea relics of World War II.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Lost Tomb From the Lookout
programme.desc: Josh Gates lands in the ancient Mayan city of El Mirador to look for the lost tomb of the Snake Kings, a mysterious ruling dynasty.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Final Resting Place of Kings
programme.desc: Josh continues his exploration of the Mayan city of El Mirador. He digs into the possible burial of the mysterious Snake Kings and uncovers secrets behind an ancient city's fall.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Normandy Revealed
programme.desc: Josh investigates the battles on land, air and sea in the historic city of Normandy. He reveals a horrific Nazi threat and unearths an enormous German bunker complex that's been hidden for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Siberia's Coldest Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators re-trace the last steps of the hikers. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Normandy Revealed
programme.desc: Josh investigates the battles on land, air and sea in the historic city of Normandy. He reveals a horrific Nazi threat and unearths an enormous German bunker complex that's been hidden for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for the Golden Owl
programme.desc: John Gates joins treasure hunters in the search for the Golden Owl, worth half a million dollars. A book of riddles gives cryptic clues as to where the Owl statuette is hidden.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Scotland
programme.desc: John joins treasure hunters in the Scottish Highlands chasing a lead on a lost cache of gold that was hidden after the Jacobite Uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers: Travel's Golden Age
programme.desc: An Eames lounge chair, an oil lamp, and a steam trunk are restored.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers: Pre-WWII Carousel Horse
programme.desc: A carousel, a sofa, and a weathervane, all pre-WWII, are restored.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Automobilia
programme.desc: Drew checks out the collection of an auto restorer.

programme.title: Curse of Akakor: Hunt for Answers
programme.desc: Sandy Reed, the sister of missing explorer John Reed, joins in the search for her brother's remains. And the team attempts a risky descent down a treacherous cliffside to find the entrance to one of the lost cities.

programme.title: Curse of Akakor: He Was Here
programme.desc: Deep in the Amazon jungle, the investigation tracks the final footsteps of the missing explorers. Further upriver, the team discovers a mysterious structure and its potential link to one of the lost cities.

programme.title: Curse of Akakor: Witness to Murder
programme.desc: The investigation uncovers a potential witness to the murder of one of the explorers. The testimony leads them to the scene of a grisly discovery that could break the mystery wide open.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaska
programme.desc: The Perrins brothers are building an extremely remote log hunting cabin in the heart of the Alaskan Range, in the deep wilderness of Sheep Lake. They have just two weeks to construct an entire single-story cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaska Range
programme.desc: Ana and Jacob White, leading furniture DIY-ers with thousands of social media followers, build their dream cabin in the remote Alaskan interior on Paxson Lake.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout
programme.desc: In a first-ever Homestead intervention, a daughter pleads for help from the Raneys to rescue her mother and step-father whose failing homestead in Arizona sits in the crosshairs of deadly monsoon floods and a menacing cougar.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Cystic River
programme.desc: Dennis has several giant growths on the back of his head. Juan has a rare condition he hopes Dr. Lee will understand. Natalie searches for answers as to why her body is covered in hundreds of mysterious dark bumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Lipoma Whisperer
programme.desc: Melissa has spent years trying to cover a huge lipoma with a sweatshirt. Tyler's cancer fears have prevented him from having his huge head lumps examined. Tahj is plagued by painful boils. Amber has ear keloids that can no longer be ignored.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!
programme.desc: Gerard has nearly a hundred lumps varying in size that coat his entire body. Gina has bloody lesions all over, and nobody has been able to help her. Eric has a large bump on his head that that he calls his "on/off button."

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The World's Largest Lump
programme.desc: Dr. Lee assists Ronen with the mysterious lump above his knee. Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease, Sandy has a neck lump, and Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Fault in Our Scars
programme.desc: James has a large, squishy lump on his forehead. Tanisha has a growth on her arm and itchy scars all over her body. Ed wants his stomach lump removed before his girlfriend gets out of prison. Justin has painful mystery bumps all over his head.

programme.title: Germophobia: Germophobia
programme.desc: Washing hands 80 times a day, wrapping car seats in plastic, making guests wear hazmat suits and roasting in a hot sauna to kill bacteria before sex are just some of the ways Brian, Keshius and Toni navigate life with their Germophobia.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Life-Altering News
programme.desc: While Amy reaps the benefits of weight-loss surgery, her sister Tammy worries that she gained weight during quarantine. A visit to urgent care gives Amy life-changing news. Tammy's family confronts her over her health.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The World's Largest Lump

programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which Joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame

programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rites of Passage

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Grown Up

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lions and Tigers and Texts

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Final Curtain

programme.title: Bunk'd: Look Who's Squawking

programme.title: Jessie: Pain in the Rear Window

programme.title: Jessie: Teacher's Pest
programme.desc: When Zuri is having problems with a teacher at school, Jessie decides to volunteer in Zuri's classroom so she can assess the situation. Because Jessie has always been the teacher’s pet, she figures the teacher will love her but this isn't the case.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Vortex & Next Train
programme.desc: Wesley and Gabby accidentally kiss, so they steal alien mind-wipe technology from Jeremy in order to forget it ever happened.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Rock the Float!
programme.desc: Syd, Olive, Sophia and Emmy are excited that their design for the float honouring brave women was chosen for the annual Portland parade.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Diss Track

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dress to Express
programme.desc: When Levi makes a documentary to see how a person's style influences people's perception of them, he has Nia, Tess and Booker change up their style of dress which leads to surprising results.

programme.title: Jessie: The Talented Mr. Kipling
programme.desc: Despite being weary of Ravi's seven-foot Asian water monitor lizard, Jessie comes to the lizard's rescue after the head of the condo board attempts to ban him from the building. Meanwhile, Zuri brings home another imaginary friend.

programme.title: Jessie: Take the A-Train ... I Think?

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sweet 16-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sleep-A-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Parents & Punishments

programme.desc: A woman's innocence is called into question after her husband dies from a mysterious malady and encourages detectives to take a deep dive into her past.

programme.title: Snapped: Marie Hilley
programme.desc: After a bizarre account of suspected false identity is reported, authorities uncover a long history of an evasive criminal and launch a nationwide hunt to catch a killer who uses Southern charm as a weapon of deception.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Black Friday
programme.desc: Ashlea Harris had no shortage of admirers. So when she was found dead after a suspicious fire consumed her apartment, police were baffled.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayal Of Trust
programme.desc: Deede Keller had a loving family, a tight circle of friends and a new man in her life. When she vanished, disturbing clues would point investigators to a suspect with a dark secret. The case provided a twist that left the courtroom astonished.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Broken Bonds
programme.desc: A quiet night was shattered when intruders terrorized a Florida couple and their young son, killing one of them. Investigators questioned the initial story. Then, a tip led them to another family with dark secrets, and that's when bonds were tested.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: During a cold Minneapolis winter, a night out with good friends takes a dark turn when one of them disappears. Days later, when human remains are discovered, investigators travel a chilling path to catch a killer before another night ends in murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Lover's Chair
programme.desc: A couple's romantic evening atop Rockefeller Lookout in New Jersey ends with the wife's tragic death. Her death is ruled an accident, but a decade later investigators uncover a web of lies forcing them to take another look at the case.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Relentless
programme.desc: A Texas woman's apparent suicide devastates the family that she leaves behind. But after one investigator dedicates decades to solving the mystery of what drove her to make such a tragic decision, a truth that is far more sinister is discovered.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Deadly Inferno

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Reckoning

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Doubt

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assets
programme.desc: When Atwater goes undercover in a dangerous South Side drug syndicate, he learns there may be more to its kingpin than meets the eye.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Familia
programme.desc: After a botched carjacking turns out to be something much bigger, Voight’s unit goes toe-to-toe with a smart drug kingpin who only works with women.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Infection
programme.desc: After zeroing in on the suspect responsible for the bioterrorism that’s gripping Chicago, the PD prepares to undertake their biggest manhunt yet.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Secrets in the Canyon
programme.desc: A tragic car accident on a canyon road becomes a murder investigation when detectives discover possible foul play. What follows is a torrid tale of love, control, and unimaginable betrayal with a person close to home pulling the strings in a plot to kill.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: I Love You to Pieces
programme.desc: A father shoots a masked intruder after he is ambushed in his own garage. As the unknown assailant clings to life, LAPD try to make sense of the strange situation, revealing a twisted web of manipulation and lies within this unsuspecting family.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Real Estate Revenge

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror at Doomsday Dam
programme.desc: When America's tallest dam threatens to burst, a nearby town finds itself an hour away from total annihilation, and engineers use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: A skyscraper causing hellish heat in downtown Dallas, a swarm of sinkholes, and a landmark with a fatal secret.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sins of Ghost Vegas
programme.desc: An abandoned Vegas-style getaway with a deadly secret, a ghost town sinking into the earth, and a passenger train on a course for disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sinkhole at the Museum
programme.desc: A massive sinkhole swallows millions of dollars of legendary automobiles at the National Corvette Museum in Kentucky. Expert geologists investigate and reveal how an enormous cave system could remain undetected and poised for catastrophic destruction.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Train of Terror
programme.desc: A devastating rail disaster outside a small North Dakota town results in cargo erupting in massive explosions; experts use the latest science to investigate and uncover an engineering flaw poised for catastrophic failure.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Greatest Submarine
programme.desc: The deepest-diving submersible vessel in the world is one of the most intricately designed craft that has ever been engineered for the sea, and having reached the bottom of each of the five oceans, this submarine's accomplishments are truly monumental.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Mars Rover Declassified
programme.desc: The Rosalind Franklin Mars rover is a brand-new space mission to discover hard evidence of extraterrestrial life. Special access reveals how engineers and experts are making a new age in exploration possible.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Train of Terror
programme.desc: A devastating rail disaster outside a small North Dakota town results in cargo erupting in massive explosions; experts use the latest science to investigate and uncover an engineering flaw poised for catastrophic failure.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Greatest Submarine
programme.desc: The deepest-diving submersible vessel in the world is one of the most intricately designed craft that has ever been engineered for the sea, and having reached the bottom of each of the five oceans, this submarine's accomplishments are truly monumental.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Mars Rover Declassified
programme.desc: The Rosalind Franklin Mars rover is a brand-new space mission to discover hard evidence of extraterrestrial life. Special access reveals how engineers and experts are making a new age in exploration possible.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sinkhole at the Museum
programme.desc: A massive sinkhole swallows millions of dollars of legendary automobiles at the National Corvette Museum in Kentucky. Expert geologists investigate and reveal how an enormous cave system could remain undetected and poised for catastrophic destruction.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Message
programme.desc: Take a look at what might really happen if we got a message from space. Scientists and sci-fi writers, with cooperation from SETI and Carl Sagan's son, Nick, unravel the impact of this world changing event.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Arrival
programme.desc: Take a look at how humans may react when an alien spacecraft makes its way to Earth.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Invasion
programme.desc: A swarm of small spacecraft depart their huge mother ship, and hover in our atmosphere.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Offspring
programme.desc: A mothership the size of Texas is hovering over Earth and we are tired of waiting. We send a rover to explore, and what we find makes us question the definition of life. On Earth, the pods multiply and get smaller, making contact with them unavoidabe.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: What to Expect
programme.desc: Aliens exist. Scientists lay out what we can expect them to be like by grappling with difficult questions.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: How to Prepare
programme.desc: Inject a dose of cutting-edge research into an action-packed journey through space, to find out exactly whether aliens might come here, and how to prepare when they arrive.This everything you need to know; it's the definitive guide.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: A team of experts use the latest science and cutting-edge technology to investigate if extraterrestrial life has contacted humankind, and what they discover could reveal if there's an international conspiracy to cover it all up.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Mystery of Doomsday Jungle
programme.desc: When 400 earthquakes strike a remote jungle in Mexico over just two weeks, dozens of UFO sightings are reported nearby, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this bizarre event is the smoking gun evidence of alien contact.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Hunt for the Alien Relics
programme.desc: New clues suggest that aliens were in contact with the ancient cultures of Mesoamerica, and to prove it, a team of experts hunt down mysterious artifacts that could change everything we know about our place in the cosmos.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: The Volcano Enigma
programme.desc: New evidence points to a strange link between UFO sightings and volcanoes, and to test the explosive theory, a team of experts investigate one of the most mysterious mass reports of alien contact in history.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Alien Crater of Doom
programme.desc: New discoveries of strange evidence in the forests of Argentina suggest an alien craft landed here, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting edge technology to investigate the area and hunt down the truth.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Haunting in the Heartland
programme.desc: New discoveries of a cluster of UFO sightings in the American heartland suggest a government cover-up, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate why so many sightings are occurring in such a remote area.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: War on the Amazon
programme.desc: A remote island on the Amazon is the site of an alleged alien attack, and a team of experts use the latest tech and first-hand testimony to investigate what really happened during this sinister incident.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: When an unthinkably violent criminal flees before his trial, John Walsh joins local authorities on the chase for Michael Waguespack. Cal uncovers hidden and painful truths in a Christmas Eve tragedy that sent police hunting for Miguel Angel Martinez.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Last Party
programme.desc: A wild party ends in terror as a bright, young mom's cries for help fall on deaf ears. When detectives retrace her final steps they find a trap with no way out.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Lost Angel
programme.desc: Two distraught women call 911 when they discover their sister brutally murdered. Soon, detectives uncover a stunning surprise and struggle to find a killer whose self-hatred drove him to commit the ultimate sin, in a precedent-setting case.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: She Set Me Up
programme.desc: Evansville, Indiana Police rely on an unlikely source of information as they search for the person responsible for shooting 28-year-old D'Angelo White. Cryptic clues left by the victim himself challenge the investigative skills of veteran detectives.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Robin Tattoo
programme.desc: A dismembered torso turns up in a Florida forest, and the discovery launches detectives across the US to search for answers. With only a tattoo found on the victim, investigators must solve this horrific mystery before the killer is gone for good.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Bathtub
programme.desc: In 2000, a South Barrington, Illinois, rookie cop responds to the scene of what many believe to be an accidental drowning. The officer feels something about it doesn't sit quite right - and it's a hunch that, ten years later, he still hasn't forgotten.

programme.title: See No Evil: One Last Shot
programme.desc: A family's worst nightmare begins when 30-year-old Jennifer Krajnak is gunned down after a night out with friends at a bar in Lemon Grove, California. Investigators zero in on multiple suspects but it's surveillance footage that leads to her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Robin Tattoo
programme.desc: A dismembered torso turns up in a Florida forest, and the discovery launches detectives across the US to search for answers. With only a tattoo found on the victim, investigators must solve this horrific mystery before the killer is gone for good.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Bathtub
programme.desc: In 2000, a South Barrington, Illinois, rookie cop responds to the scene of what many believe to be an accidental drowning. The officer feels something about it doesn't sit quite right - and it's a hunch that, ten years later, he still hasn't forgotten.

programme.title: See No Evil: Right Man, Wrong Man
programme.desc: On June 12th 2013, family man Richard Arenas is gunned down in broad daylight in the driveway of his suburban home with no apparent motive or witnesses.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Back of the Shed
programme.desc: A backyard shed in a Michigan trailer park holds the answers to a dark secret regarding a missing teenage couple. Police interview their families, but one member is evasive, deepening the mystery and setting off a covert manhunt across the Midwest.

programme.title: Twisted: Murder Mates
programme.desc: In 1984, a killer couple goes on a brutal killing spree throughout the Midwest. After claiming the lives of 8 victims, the pair must decide if they'll keep killing or surrender to the police. Their mindless violence leaves the region shocked and appalled.

programme.title: The 1990s: The Deadliest Decade: Roid Rage
programme.desc: When a young millionaire couple goes missing from their flashy estate and their Lamborghini turns up in the Everglades, detectives worry they are the latest victims of a gang of brutal bodybuilders who target Miami entrepreneurs and bleed them dry.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide: So Many Women
programme.desc: A beautiful young co-ed is strangled to death in the bathroom of her Charlotte, North Carolina home. Her murder ignites an investigation that leads police down a horrifying trail of bodies in pursuit of a diabolical serial killer.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: After 32-year-old Mark Mueller's body is pulled from the shore of Lake Michigan, police wonder how his favorite fishing spot became a scene for murder. It's not until his burned-out car is found miles away that officers finally get some answers.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: Blood on the Tracks
programme.desc: After a body is discovered in Silver Lakes, CA, detectives work to piece a difficult puzzle together. They uncover a web of lies that unveils a sordid tale of betrayal. At trial the truth finally emerges and the identity of the killer is revealed.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seeking Out Maple
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 28th, 2011, student Maple Batalia is found shot dead in the parking lot of Simon Fraser University.

programme.title: See No Evil: Driven to the Edge
programme.desc: After dropping her two boys at school in Coral Springs, Florida, Surya Toha vanishes without a trace. Her husband is devastated and detectives have few clues to work with... until chilling CCTV footage reveals exactly what happened to her.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: The Silver Man
programme.desc: The Atlanta Homicide team is called to a crime scene when a body wrapped head to toe in silver tape is discovered at a church playground in an upscale Atlanta neighborhood. Once the victim's identity is unveiled, a twisted love triangle is revealed.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Deadly Anniversary
programme.desc: A 32-year marriage ends with Jim Melgar dead, and his wife Sandy accused of murder. Find out if Sandy killed him, or if police were too quick to close the case. A podcaster with a virtual army of amateur detectives tries to change a verdict.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Horror on the Homestead
programme.desc: When three respected members of a tight-knit community of award-winning Christmas tree farmers are brutally gunned down, terrified locals fear that a cold-blooded killer has been living among them for years.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Night Shift Nightmare
programme.desc: The naked body of 19-year-old Wanda Musk is found just miles from where she worked at local gas station. In the wake of the vicious killing, suspicions mount over several young men in the community including her ex-boyfriend and a troubled local teen.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: My Name is Denise
programme.desc: In North Port, Florida, police receive a call that a young mother has gone missing from her home. In an effort to find her, detectives follow a trail of incoming 911 calls that reveal a heartbreaking story more horrific than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Rome's Navy Seals
programme.desc: They are the amphibious Roman unit tasked with the impossible. Called Batavians, they led the invasion of ancient Britain in AD43. Discover the story behind a desperate mission deep in enemy territory that may hand the emperor an unlikely victory.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Making a Splash in Arizona
programme.desc: Jeromey and Jay of Premier Pools create a personal resort for Arizona newcomers: Sally and Samer.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tennessee Dream Pool
programme.desc: The Yarbrough family, Franklin Tennessee locals, call upon the experts at Peek Pools and Spas to build their dream pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Eyesore to Ultimate Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: A family that loves to entertain relocates from Chicago to Nashville. They are in desperate need of a pool for the hot summer days. However, their backyard is not functional for the kids, so Kelly, Christian and Cameron work to transform the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Perfect Time for a Pool and Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: A Houston, Texas, family is ready to make their dream pool a reality, so the Pool Kings accept the challenge to take this family's outdoor fun to the next level with a dynamic, resort-style pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Natural Fit for a Fun Family
programme.desc: After moving to their forever home, a young family from College Grove, TN, is ready to build their dream pool. The Pool Kings accept the challenge, creating a tropical paradise with a massive waterfall, a swim-up bar and an oversized outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Sliding Into Paradise
programme.desc: A young Tennessee family's steep backyard has made it impossible to enjoy. Kyle and Justin build a family fun zone that includes a waterfall, a fire pit, and a custom waterslide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Gotta Have My Grotto
programme.desc: A young family from Carlsbad, California wants a nice backyard where the kids can play. Mike and Jim are up for the challenge and build a power-packed pool with a spa, underwater volcano, custom slide and a Tuscan grotto.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Canyon Country Playground
programme.desc: A big family on a large property wants to replace their old patio and pool with an updated design. Mike and Jim deliver on the dream by transforming the yard into a canyon country playground. The backyard oasis includes a lazy river and a cave.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Zen and the Art of Pools
programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain
programme.desc: Lucas heads west to Bountiful, UT to build a dream backyard on the side of a mountain. Faced with many challenges, Lucas creates a Tuscan themed pool complete with a spa, the biggest linear fire wall he's ever built and a grotto with a 23,000 pound lid.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Juicy, Crunchy and Tangy
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Lexington, Ky. for a plump pork burger and ingenious smoked chicken wings smothered in a blackberry jalapeno sauce.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Bigger and Better in Texas
programme.desc: Discover a Forth Worth Tex Mex Burrito almost as big as the state of Texas itself.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bacon 2: The Sequel
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Postman Always Brings Rice
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Hawaii for the Maui Fair where rice is always on the menu. He enjoys traditional Hawaiian treats like the Laulau Feast and Loco Moco and cross-cultural favs like Furikake Salmon.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Italian
programme.desc: Roger Mooking counts down 15 of the very best Italian dishes in the U.S. All the pastas, sauces, cheeses, pizzas, lasagnas and parms, no favorite is left behind. Also, chefs share authentic recipes and tips for making an Italian feast at home.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Bigger Is Better
programme.desc: From an omelette made with 15 eggs and six meats in Rhode Island, to a two pound, softball-size meatball served on top of a mountain of spaghetti in Missouri, we are on the lookout for dishes served in gargantuan portions.

programme.desc: The most artful and indulgent Asian cuisines across the country are highlighted, from authentic hand-tossed noodles and colourful arcade-inspired dumplings to monster-sized sushi and creative curries.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mud and Steel in New Mexico
programme.desc: Roger heads to the heart of New Mexico where cooking with fire is taken to new culinary heights with mud and steel. Roger visits Comida de Campos in Embudo, a farm and cooking school where delicious feasts are cooked in cone-shaped clay ovens.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lone Star Load-Up

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa

programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cousin Jilly/ Gloria's Cafe
programme.desc: Tilly revives 'Cousin Jilly,' an alter-ego she created to entertain Cricket when they were younger. Gloria opens a secret café in the former Big Coffee space without permission.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Candace Disconnected/ Magic Carpet Ride
programme.desc: Candace has no choice but to go to her brothers for help after she loses her phone for the fifth time. Then, inspired by Dad's favourite childhood program, the boys decide to create a magic carpet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The O.W.C.A. Files
programme.desc: When an evil mastermind from Major Monogram's past, Professor Parenthesis, launches an attack on The O.W.C.A. by incapacitating the animal agents with robotic fleas, only Agent P and his agent trainees can save the day.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Interrupted/ A Real Boy
programme.desc: Candace spends the day with her mom in the backyard so that she can bust her brothers. Then, Dr. Doofenshmirtz thinks Vanessa overhears him say he would rather have a son, so he zaps her with the Forget-About-It Ray.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mommy Can You Hear Me?/ Road Trip
programme.desc: After Candace injures her ankle and is told to stay in bed, Phineas and Ferb provide her with a box of items to stave off her boredom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Skiddley Whiffers/ Tour de Ferb
programme.desc: The boys build a giant version of a childhood game, using Danville as the central location. Candace ends up playing along with them so that she can carry on her title of 'Skiddley Whiffers Queen.' Doofenshmirtz tries to deal with Vanessa growing up.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: My Fair Goalie
programme.desc: When Ferb's cousins visit from England and challenge him to a soccer match, he and Phineas warp the walls of physics and build a high tech 3D stadium. Candace enlists the help of Eliza to teach her the rules of etiquette.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry the Actorpus/ Bullseye!
programme.desc: When Perry wins a contest and becomes the spokesanimal for Totally Tools, his secret identity is put into jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: That's the Spirit!/ The Curse of Candace
programme.desc: It's Halloween night and the kids encounter a strange boy and his father who are convinced their house is haunted. Then, Candace is bitten by a bat after watching a popular vampire movie and worries that she is becoming a vampire.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Escape From Phineas Tower/ The Remains of the Platypus
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are inspired by an antique escape chamber to build a computer-controlled tower that allows them to explore the world of escapement. Craziness is going rampant in Danville, but no one has any idea what is going on.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ferb Latin/ Lotsa Latkes
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create their own language, Ferb Latin, which quickly catches on. Then, when all of the potatoes in Danville go missing, Phineas and Ferb decide to clone some using Buford's last potato chip, with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What a Croc!/ Ferb TV
programme.desc: When the boys learn that the famous Crikey the Crocodile has gone missing, they set out to find and return him to his home at the Danville Nature Preserve.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's in the House/ Minor Monogram
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb can't find Perry and decide to create the Perrytronic 3000, a mechanical structure that can assume any form.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Star Wars
programme.desc: The story is set a couple summers ago in a galaxy far, far away when Phineas, Ferb and the gang are in a parallel universe during Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope. Phineas and Ferb are living just one moisture farm over from Luke.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Our Floating Dreams/You, Me, and Fifi/My Little Garden
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse finds himself in silly situations around the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Delivery of Destiny/ Let's Bounce
programme.desc: Follow Paul the Delivery Man as he journeys through his usual stops.

programme.title: E:60: Full Circle: Freddie Freeman
programme.desc: An in-depth profile of National League MVP Freddie Freeman. Sharing the story of the Braves' first baseman's quest to replicate the family he had and chronicling his journey through heartache, infertility and a life-threatening bout of COVID-19.

programme.title: The Closer: The Round File
programme.desc: An old man's confession to seven murders leads Deputy Chief Johnson to investigate the sudden deaths at his nursing home.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Foreign Affairs
programme.desc: After an ISIS-inspired attack against a member of the US Armed Services, the FBI asks for Captain Raydor's help in finding a terrorist as Major Crimes joins the Bureau in a race against the clock before the terrorist can strike again.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Skin Deep
programme.desc: When Flynn looks into purchasing a new home and seeks input from Provenza and Buzz, an unexpected turn of events leads to a new investigation for Major Crimes. Meanwhile, Buzz continues to look into the circumstances surrounding his father's murder.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cashed Out
programme.desc: Det. Julio Sanchez's application to become a foster parent is jeopardized by his reactions to a particularly gruesome murder after the Major Crimes Division finds a chopped up body burned to bits in the barbecue pit of an L.A. Park.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: When a pair of British tourists get attacked during a Venice Beach robbery, L.A.'s twenty billion dollar tourist industry is threatened by an English journalist riding their tragedy to a career high.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Moral Hazard
programme.desc: After a shootout in a tow yard leaves three people dead, Major Crimes must scramble to find a disturbed man with a bag full of guns and a long list of grievances before he kills again. Meanwhile, Rusty goes against LAPD policy while looking for evidence.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Family Annihilator
programme.desc: After being turned down for a promotion, Brad Bishop used a sledgehammer to brutally murder his wife, his three young sons and his own mother. Although there have been multiple sightings, Brad Bishop has evaded the authorities for over 30 years.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fugitive Mom
programme.desc: A young mother chooses to vanish with her two-year-old daughter and a serial child molester is caught in Texas, but flees his trial and begins his monstrous pattern again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.desc: The Raneys face an emotional rescue of young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama. To save the legacy of an eighth generation family property, they must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Sweet Homestead Alabama (Part 2 of 2)
programme.desc: Young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama need help to save the legacy of an eighth generation family property. They must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Mississippi Mayhem
programme.desc: In Mississippi, the Raneys must first solve the mystery of flooding water before teaching a family of six to thrive off-grid together. Builds include a new Elvis-inspired 'Heartbreak Goat-tel. goat pen, garden compound and metal forge.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 2
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Americana Treasure Trove
programme.desc: Drew meets a seller who collects railway-related items, and another who collects Americana items.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Cornwall Bargains
programme.desc: Drew finds a rustic brewery in Cornwall.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Putting in Miles
programme.desc: Drew looks at automobilia, a 19th-Century old desk, and a copper lantern.

programme.title: WWII's Great Escapes: Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: A look at one of the most daring, yet unknown mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the Second World War from Stalag 18D pirson camp, during which over 80 prisoners were rescued by escapees and guided for 150 miles through rough terrain.

programme.title: WWII's Great Escapes: Freedom Trails: Italy: The Sulmona Trail
programme.desc: Monty follows a route taken by P.O.W. Len Harley, who spent months on the run from Nazis to make it over the Majella mountains. Monty also meets people who sheltered the Allies at great personal risk and Len is reunited with a woman who saved his life.

programme.title: WWII's Great Escapes: Freedom Trails: Italy: Operation Galia (Rossano)
programme.desc: Monty travels to Rossano, where escaped POWs went after the Italian Armistice and the start of Operation Galia. Monty meets some eyewitnesses to the operation and with John Redhead, whose father escaped from a POW camp.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Belly of the Beast
