programme.title: Dual Survival: Castaways
programme.desc: Joe and Cody face unpredictable and punishing tropical storms and brave shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Rocky Mountain High
programme.desc: Cody and Joe battle temperatures of negative twenty degrees Fahrenheit in a fight to stay alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Misty Mountain Drop
programme.desc: In a classic wilderness survival scenario, Cody and Joe take on the mountains of Northern California.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight
programme.desc: Stranded in a mangrove swamp in Sri Lanka, Joe and Cody escape the crocodile-filled waters only to find themselves in a leech-infested jungle. But this time, distressed elephants interrupt their journey back and they may not get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight
programme.desc: Joe comes face-to-face with elephants and is forced off a cliff, Cody masters the ancient fire piston, and they cross a crocodile-infested lake to escape the longest survival scenario in history of 'Dual Survival.'

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: Former boy bander Lance Bass and bad boy chef Michael Voltaggio are teaming up to put Bobby Flay in his place. On stage in hopes of squaring off with Bobby are Delaware chef Robbie Jester and the Garden State's top-rated French chef, James Laird.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pulling Out All the Stops
programme.desc: Actor Steve Schirripa and the toughest judge on Food Network, Simon Majumdar, have their sights set on beating Bobby. Boston chef Dave Bazirgan sharpens his knives to take on "Mr. Downtown," Stephen Jones, for the ultimate chance to cook against Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Tropical Punch
programme.desc: Well-travelled chef Zach Meloy takes on a New Orleans transplant to Brooklyn, chef Matt Pace, to prove their culinary chops. It's up to "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee and "Best Bakers in America's" Scott Conant to decide who has the skills to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Both Sides of the Coin
programme.desc: Worst Cooks in America's Anne Burrell and Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli hope that they've got all their Bobby Flay-beating bases covered.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Skirting By
programme.desc: It's an East coast battle when Rhode Island's Robert Sisca and Atlantic City's Michael Brennan duke it out in the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Winning in My Dreams
programme.desc: Pop singer Debbie Gibson and The Kitchen's Katie Lee team up to bring a winning tune to Bobby Flay's arena. Dutch-born Ype Von Hengst and Greek expert Chef William Wright compete.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Puck Stops Here
programme.desc: Culinary legend Wolfgang Puck makes his first-ever appearance at the Beat Bobby Flay arena alongside Chopped guru Ted Allen. Chefs Emily Hansen and Judy Anderson must impress the dynamic duo to get the chance to fillet the Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Kelly and the Jet
programme.desc: Former Olympian and chef Dawn Burrell and West Coast legend, Chef Rob Lam, must face off before they go for the gold against Bobby Flay. Food Network's Clinton Kelly and Jet Tila are there to cheer them on to victory.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: A Friendship in Peril
programme.desc: Robert Irvine has to save more than a restaurant at J's in Waveland, MS. Owners Louis and Jeff are close to losing everything, including their friendship of 40 years. Robert must teach them how to both run a restaurant and mend their relationship.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Hometown Favorites
programme.desc: Captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson get to know their teams better through nostalgic challenges that inspire them to dig deep into their BBQ memory banks and challenge their ability to work together.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Who Done It?
programme.desc: Food Network's Lorraine Pascale and Damaris Phillips are in the arena to figure out which baker will take on Bobby Flay. Spunky cake master Andrea Bergin and New Orleans pastry chef Jeremy Fogg show their skills for the chance at making history.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bear-Ware
programme.desc: The "Bear," Hal Holden-Bache, stands against model-turned-chef Derek Orrell in an all-out culinary battle. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and "The Chew's" Daphne Oz will decide which chef gets the chance to take down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: David Jeremiah

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Contacts
programme.desc: Unearthly visitations, heavenly messengers, close encounters: accounts of humans interacting with celestial beings have existed since the beginning of mankind.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Creation of Man
programme.desc: Look at why we humans are so different from every other living thing on earth, and whether aliens come into play.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Satan Conspiracy
programme.desc: New interpretations of ancient texts indicate that Satan may have been an extraterrestrial who was more of an ally to humanity than an enemy by passing along knowledge that planted the seed for civilization.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Insects
programme.desc: Earth is home to 10 quintillion insects. In cultures throughout the world, insects have been honoured, feared and even revered as gods.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Tesla Experiment
programme.desc: Tune in and learn about Nikola Tesla, the man who led mankind into a new industrial era and laid the groundwork for the technological age.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Secrets of the Mummies
programme.desc: Ancient Astronaut theorists believe the global practice of mummification is not a coincidence, but proof that highly advanced extraterrestrials visited Earth in the distant past.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Other Earth
programme.desc: Billions of dollars have been spent in our quest to find an 'other Earth.' Since the launch of the Kepler Telescope in 2009, scientists have identified thousands of planets capable of supporting life. This could support that theory that we aren't alone.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Visionaries
programme.desc: Scientists theorize that when mankind encounters extraterrestrials, we'll need to speak to them through the universal language of mathematics and binary code. However, some think that aliens have already been communicating with our greatest minds.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Decoding the Cosmic Egg
programme.desc: A cosmic egg, in which the universe or some primordial being comes into existence by the hatching of an egg, is found in the creation myths of many cultures. Clues to the origin of the cosmic egg may lie in another symbol which resembles our DNA code.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Replicants
programme.desc: Over 1.5 billion people believe in reincarnation, the belief that a soul can be reborn into a different body after death. Ancient Astronaut Theorists suggest that reincarnation exists and the human body is designed for otherworldly entities.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Deadly Path
programme.desc: When a woman falls to her death while hiking with her husband in Rocky Mountain National Park, rangers question if her death was an accident or a heinous act of violence.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Sting
programme.desc: Newlywed Dalia Dippolito returned home from the gym to the awful news that her husband had been killed. In a case where almost nothing was as it seemed, investigators wanted to know: Was Dalia diabolical or an unwitting pawn in a hoax gone wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Dark Valley
programme.desc: Gavin Smith was dashing. When he vanished, LA detectives were unsure if they were investigating a crime or a suicide. His wife said he'd gotten lost in drugs and flings. Police wondered if the key to finding Gavin was hidden in one of those affairs.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets at Sunshine Motel
programme.desc: Vern Holbrook seemed to have it all: A thriving estate company and a beautiful family. When this beloved patriarch failed to show up at a meeting with his daughter-in-law, she was concerned Vern was not delayed, that it was something far worse.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Payson Canyon
programme.desc: Kay Mortensen took pride in preparing for every possible threat, so when he was found dead at home, those who knew him were stunned. The brutal killing put two of Kay's loved ones behind bars and in danger.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Out There in the Dark
programme.desc: Brandy Daniels believed someone was stalking her. Then, the single mother was found slumped over in her car, shot dead. Investigators would spend years navigating the twists and turns searching for her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Trust
programme.desc: Wealthy residents felt safe in their gated community but it was not safe for one millionaire, murdered in his waterfront home. Police investigated but the case grew cold. Turned out the key to solving it, or two keys, were right at the front door.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Devil's Bathtub
programme.desc: Craig and Laura Rideout appeared happy but, after a contentious separation revealed an ugly secret, one of them would soon be dead. Clues pointed to four possible killers and left investigators wondering if this murder was all in the family.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Twisted in Texas
programme.desc: Meghan Verikas had been attracted to Leon Jacob, in part, because as a doctor he saved lives. Now police officers were telling her he was trying to hire a hitman, potentially to take hers. But authorities had a plan of their own.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Acting On Evil
programme.desc: After a Wisconsin cast party, a mother makes an unimaginable discovery. Suddenly, a close circle of friends is under suspicion for murder. As detectives work quickly to unravel this mystery, another vicious attack may lead them to their killer.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: A Deadly Con
programme.desc: A navy veteran is brutally stabbed in his senior living community. As detectives work to find the killer, they discover a persuasive con artist. Could this scammer have graduated from fraud to murder?

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Ultimate Sin
programme.desc: After leaving a support group, a young mother is gunned down by a masked shooter. As investigators try to make sense of the case, they reveal a story of religious manipulation that leads to one person committing the ultimate sin.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Victims Wanted
programme.desc: A man is shot after answering a local help wanted ad. Detectives soon discover there are other victims with eerily similar stories. Their quest to locate a possible serial killer leads them to a suspected killer working for an evil manipulator.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: A murder in a Bulgarian neighborhood results in a challenging investigation when locals won't talk to police. Ruzek has a clash with a patrol officer.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: False Positive
programme.desc: The shocking murder of young boys affects Halstead. Crawford encourages Intelligence to use a new facial-recognition software to help identify a suspect, but the plan backfires.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Queen of the County
programme.desc: The Harkey name was famous for pecan harvesting in Texas. So when the matriarch with a powerful grip on the family fortune went missing, investigators focused on the family tree. Turns out, the plot was more tangled than the branches of a pecan tree.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: After Midnight

programme.desc: A bizarre find called Copper Scroll is one of the famous Dead Sea Scrolls, but it's unlike any of the others. This strange relic might hold clues to a long-lost treasure, and cutting-edge science may finally reveal answers to this billion-dollar mystery.

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Relic That Sees the Future
programme.desc: A bizarre 3,000 year-old gold relic crafted with intricately designed cryptic patterns is believed to form a highly complex celestial code. Using advanced imaging technology, experts speculate that it could be an ancient device for predicting the future.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Black Mirror
programme.desc: The Obsidian Mirror is a mysterious artifact crafted from volcanic rock, and it's said to be a supernatural device used to communicate with angels and spirits. Experts use cutting-edge tech to discover who made this strange relic and why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hollywood vs. Nazis
programme.desc: A war-torn Italian ghost town immortalized by a legendary Hollywood director blurs the lines between fiction and reality; experts investigate and uncover a forgotten landscape of ruins captured in a WWII documentary.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Ancient Alien Computer
programme.desc: An ancient piece of corroded metal is more than it seems. An alien-looking device of intricate dials and cogs. Using cutting-edge imaging technology, experts examine what could actually be a 2,000-year-old computer.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Death Fortress
programme.desc: A desert island adrift in the Gulf of Mexico contains a massive and marooned structure with a contagious past. Experts investigate and uncover a desolate military fortress turned prison and plagued by a deadly disease.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hollywood vs. Nazis
programme.desc: A war-torn Italian ghost town immortalized by a legendary Hollywood director blurs the lines between fiction and reality; experts investigate and uncover a forgotten landscape of ruins captured in a WWII documentary.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Aliens of the Microcosmos
programme.desc: The hidden kingdom of microscopic alien organisms shapes the universe as much as galaxies, stars, and planets. New discoveries reveal how bacteria, viruses, and other alien micro-organisms built life on Earth and influence humanity's future in the cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds
programme.desc: Discoveries of new planets have revealed countless worlds much stranger than Earth. Some of these strange worlds don't have stars, others are made out of diamonds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Alien Worlds
programme.desc: An explosion in the discovery of exoplanets is challenging everything we know about our universe; experts use cutting-edge astronomy to investigate these mysterious alien worlds and how they defy the laws of physics.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: National Emergency
programme.desc: Strange lights in the New Zealand sky cause a formal investigation from the government. US paratroopers are blinded by mysterious light in Vietnam.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: Arctic Invasion
programme.desc: The arctic skies are lit by an incredible light display. Pilots make startling UFO reports at O'Hare airport in Chicago. Looking back on the first public UFO scare in the 50s.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: UFO Dogfight
programme.desc: The Canadian government declares a UFO incident when a string of lights crashes into the water. A silvery object is seen in the New Zealand sky. Fighters scramble to investigate a UFO in Iran, which leads to a strange dogfight.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: War Zone
programme.desc: We investigate reports of a crash landing in the eastern U.S. in 1965, unidentified light streaks in the sky in Spain and Portugal and a strange report of a UFO during the Vietnam War.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: UFO Swarm
programme.desc: A mysterious object causes witnesses to obtain inexplicable injuries. Americans in two states witness massive objects in the night sky. The Brazilian Air Force plays cat and mouse with a swarm of UFOs.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: Fireball Attack
programme.desc: This episode looks into some of the most mysterious incidents involving UFOs. Stories include Brazilian military cover ups, Australian light phenomena and an attack on police helicopter pilots.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: A Mystery in the Pines
programme.desc: Caught in a love triangle, young chef and mom Heather Mallory vanishes. Now Portland detectives and Heather's parents search for the truth in an investigation involving wiretaps, confidential informants and a dramatic resolution deep in the forest.

programme.title: American Monster: Second Chance
programme.desc: Joy and Fred are typical high-school sweethearts until a tragic work accident changes the course of their lives forever. As Joy tries to find a second shot at love, her past will refuse to let her go... and sets in motion a heart-breaking tragedy.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: He Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Lila Warwick is a loving and hands-on grandmother of eight whose door is always open for holidays, birthdays or for anyone in need of a helping hand.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tainted Love
programme.desc: When love turns to obsession, these women make their lover their possession.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Evil Spirits
programme.desc: When one deals with the devil, somebody's gonna get burned.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Philly Fallout
programme.desc: The building of a backyard shed destroys a years long, close relationship between two neighbors and ignites a vicious conflict that sees property destroyed, pets killed, and finally two people shot to death in cold blood.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Fence Face Off
programme.desc: Complaints about dogs running loose lead to the construction of a fence between two long-time neighbors, but the problem isn't solved and flaring tempers lead to fist fights, stabbings, and ultimately a shocking shootout captured on video.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Evil Spirits
programme.desc: When one deals with the devil, somebody's gonna get burned.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Philly Fallout
programme.desc: The building of a backyard shed destroys a years long, close relationship between two neighbors and ignites a vicious conflict that sees property destroyed, pets killed, and finally two people shot to death in cold blood.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mountain of Madness
programme.desc: A wealthy executive comes into conflict with his neighbors when he forbids them access to his extensive lands. One local handyman fights to keep the roads and trails open for all, a struggle that ends when one man lies dead.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Takers
programme.desc: All of us would like a little extra cash, but only a few are prepared to steal a life to get it.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Connecticut Horror Story
programme.desc: One summer night in 2007 comes as a nightmare for the Petit family when woken up by two strangers in their quiet, peaceful home of Cheshire, Connecticut. Suddenly this family of four finds themselves held hostage and in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Sherri Rasmussen and John Ruetten are enjoying newlywed life until one morning in 1986 when Sherri calls into work sick. That night John returns home, only to find her murdered. Years later, detectives discover her killer was too close for comfort.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: The Newlydeads
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA, 1968: Cheryl Perveler is found in her yellow sports car bleeding out from a gunshot wound to the head. When investigators dig into Cheryl's life, the plot that they uncover will defy even the most outlandish expectations.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Beast with a Badge
programme.desc: A detective struggles to exonerate his friend, a black former cop, from rape allegations pinned on him by the LAPD's all-white brass. He'll navigate entrenched racism, lead a stake-out and employ the magic of Hollywood to ensnare the real predator.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Black Sheep
programme.desc: When the four members of the Mark family are found murdered in their home, police suspect someone close to the family is responsible. The bizarre truth will shake the small town of Cedar Falls and devastate the surviving members of the Mark family.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Murder Most Obsessive
programme.desc: Aspiring actress Vicki Morgan is bludgeoned to death with a baseball bat by her roommate. After he confesses to the cops, it seems like an open and shut case.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Was Bambi Framed?
programme.desc: She's a model. A Playboy bunny. But is she a murderer too? Some call Lawrencia "Bambi" Bembenek a made-for-TV killer. Others say she is innocent. Two Vanity Fair writers want to know- did she pull the trigger, or was Bambi framed?

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Sandra Garner
programme.desc: '48 Hours' gives viewers a rare look inside a murder case where the investigation unfolds on camera, from virtually everything from the first moments through the verdict are captured.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Secrets of the Mesa
programme.desc: Convicted of killing his wife in 2004, a Colorado man gets a second shot at freedom.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Avert Your Eyes
programme.desc: When Pamela Edwards is found shot through the heart, Lt. Joe Kenda's first task is to shield her young daughters from the horrendous scene. Soon police close in on her killer, ending with a white-knuckle car and foot chase across Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff's deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight. When he's found dead in his patrol car the next morning, his fellow lawmen must set aside their grief and hunt down his killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda's city into a panic. Who is responsible? Just when investigators think they've got a handle on what is going on, a cryptic letter to the District Attorney's office suggests the girl isn't the only victim.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: A Hamilton detective follows a string of intriguing evidence in the hopes it will unravel the mystery of why an innocent father of four was executed.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Past and Present
programme.desc: Many researchers believe we have been visited by otherworldly spacecraft since the dawn of man. Trace the evidence from the history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and through the art of the Renaissance period.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The incredible story of how Nazi scientists and UFOs combined to create technology that changed the world.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Killer Magic
programme.desc: It is the great untold story of World War Two. The role the Occult played in shaping and determining the outcome of the fight. Nazi Killer Magic reveals how esotericism and mysticism influenced Hitler's wartime commanders.

programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson 'Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be a Ladies' Man
programme.desc: David Corbin is a career criminal. After a stint in prison, Corbin launches a crime wave, stealing cars and selling them for a profit. But when a jealous girlfriend rats him out, Corbin is caught and sent to prison where he pulls off a daring escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape With One Leg
programme.desc: Walter Rhodes and two other suspects were involved in the murder of two cops. Rhodes agrees to testify against the others for a lesser sentence and is eventually released. Shortly afterwards, he violates his parole but refuses to go back.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pretend I'm a Priest
programme.desc: Con artist Fred Brito reinvented himself dozens of times and conducted a symphony orchestra, was elected to a public office, and administered mass as a fake catholic priest.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.desc: Jim and Sarah are looking for a diamond in the rough on the hidden gem of Fripp Island, North Carolina. They find a property with an unparalleled oceanfront overlook.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Outer Banks Transformation
programme.desc: After 20 years of renting on North Carolina's Outer Banks, two high school sweethearts are determined to purchase their forever home. They find a fixer-upper that's perfect for their family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Destined for a Renovation in Destin, Florida
programme.desc: Carrie and Lee have been splitting their time between Nashville and Destin, Florida but they want to get their two sons out of the city and into the sunshine - permanently.

programme.desc: Fallon and Mark Jennings are Texas natives with a big Texas family, and they're on the hunt for the perfect waterside home on North Padre Island.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Special Occasion
programme.desc: Nothing makes a special occasion more memorable than having the best food! We're counting down the best meals for any special occasion, starting with Beau MacMillan's unforgettable gnocchi in San Diego.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chengdu
programme.desc: From the blistering 'Hot Pot' and fiery Mapo Tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Bronx
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the international flavors of one of America's most diverse communities, the Bronx, New York. He finds Italian-influenced bites like dry-aged pork sausage, spicy Jamaican meat pastries and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Zagreb
programme.desc: Andrew dives in to the fairytale-like city of Zagreb, Croatia. The city's cuisine has a meat-centric menu and celebrates iconic dishes like porky kotlovina, tender veal cheeks and savory stuffed peppers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew makes a trip to the coastal crossroads of the South Savannah, Georgia, where the food in influenced by rich culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Wisconsin
programme.desc: Andrew visits America's Dairy Land, but he finds out there's a lot more going on with the food in Wisconsin than meets the eye. Andrew finds that Wisconsinites are finding new ways to do things the old fashioned way. He discovers the science behind milk.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Serious Flame Game
programme.desc: It's a race against the clock, and three chefs are fired up to show off their signature dishes in the Wildfire Round. It's a battle between hot and cold in the Crossfire round.

programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.desc: The boys go out in search of Doonkelberries so that Mom can make her famous pie.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sleepwalk Surprise/ Sci-Fi Pie Fly
programme.desc: Candace's plans to hang out with Jeremy are derailed after he becomes interested in playing a new game. Phineas and Ferbs create their own flying saucer to help solve a mystery.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: DuckTales: Sky Pirates...In the Sky!
programme.desc: Tired of being ignored by his family, Dewey’s search for attention goes too far when he falls in with flamboyant Don Karnage and his cutthroat gang of Singing Sky Pirates.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Other Bin of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Lena uses Webby to infiltrate the vault where Scrooge keeps all his most dangerous artifacts.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: Amphibia: Night Drivers/ Return to Wartwood
programme.desc: Ignoring Anne's and Hop Pop's warnings about the dangers of night driving, Sprig and Polly stay up all night to drive the family home. Then, The Plantar's come up with a plan after learning they forgot to bring gifts.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Shut-In!
programme.desc: In this special extended episode, Anne and the Plantars protect themselves from the dangers of the annual Blue Moon by locking themselves in the house and entertaining each other with the scariest stories they can think of.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Raging Bully/ Lights, Candace, Action!
programme.desc: Phineas is challenged to a duel by the local bully and enters the ring for a thumb wrestling competition. Then Candace gets her chance at fame until Phineas and Ferb enter as directors.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Snowed In
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Curse of the Ghost Tree
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Oh, There You Are, Perry/ Swiss Family Phineas
programme.desc: A musical device is built to find Perry/ A trip at sea strands the family on an island.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Baljeatles/ Vanessassary Roughness
programme.desc: Baljeet signs up for rock camp and Vanessa tries to convince her dad she is responsible.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline
programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Mages and Mazes/ Okay Karaoke
programme.desc: The kids play a role-playing game at Remy's but his rules lead to conflict. The Greens go out for karaoke, but Tilly struggles to express her true self through song.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Mom Attractor/ Cranius Maximus
programme.desc: Candice asks the boys to invent a device that attracts their mom so that she can bust her brothers. In the meantime, Dr. Doofenshmirtz invents a 'Baby-Cry-Inator.' The boys invent a cerebral stimulatory hat to help Baljeet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sipping With the Enemy/ Tri-State Treasure: Boot of Secrets
programme.desc: Candace tries to bust Phineas and Ferb when they put on an enormous backyard magic show. Vanessa and Major Monogram's son, Monty, get coffee together.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Last Day of Summer
programme.desc: Candace uses the last day of summer to bust her brothers, but things go out of control with Doofenshmirtz's Do-Over-Inator.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Day of the Living Gelatin!/ Elementary, My Dear Stacy
programme.desc: Pool filled with bouncy gelatin and it comes to life; later family takes trip to England.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Don't Even Blink/ Chez Platypus
programme.desc: A determined Candace decides to find out where her brothers creations disappear to, and Phineas and Ferb open a platypus themed restaurant.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry Lays an Egg/ Gaming the System
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an egg, which they believe belongs to Perry, so they build a mechanical contraption to care for it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Let's Take a Quiz/ At the Car Wash
programme.desc: Candace wants to win popularity by going on Phineas and Ferb's TV game show. Later, an automatic carwash is created to help Isabella and the Fireside girls meet their fundraising goals.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: When Worlds Collide/ Road to Danville
programme.desc: Discovering that a strange planet is hurtling directly towards Danville, Phineas and Ferb set out to avert a disaster, while Buford looks forward to making contact with its alien race. Dr. Doofenshirmtz hopes to steal the world's largest ball of twine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Blackout!/ What'd I Miss?
programme.desc: Candace is put in charge of the boys right before the entire city loses electricity and they use the opportunity to make the most out of the blackout. Phineas and the gang try training domesticated squirrels to live in the wild.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Cellmates Secrets: Drew Peterson
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Drew's ex-fiancé reveals a shocking revelation relating to his fourth wife, Stacy's, disappearance.

programme.title: Movie: The Client List
programme.desc: A former Texas homecoming queen inadvertently finds herself in the middle of a prostitution ring after unknowingly accepting a position at a massage parlor.

programme.title: Movie: Secrets of a Marine's Wife
programme.desc: Based on the true story of 19-year-old Erin Corwin, who was married to U.S. Marine Corporal Jon Corwin and expecting her first child, when she suddenly went missing.

programme.title: Movie: Stalked by My Husband's Ex
programme.desc: A newly engaged woman begins to suspect her husband's ex isn't gone for good.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Til Death Do Us Party
programme.desc: When, Thomas Talley, a family man is gunned down in his driveway, his bereft widow Kendra recounts how a wild night in New Orleans ended in murder. Only after police begin to dissect her story, do they realize that there might be more to her tale.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Backcountry Backstabber
programme.desc: After a woman is viciously slain in her country home, police are stumped as to who could have had a vendetta against the kind and generous woman.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Big Easy Black Widow
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, resources are depleted. When a Pastor turns up dead outside of his New Orleans apartment, his case, along with countless others, goes cold, until his wife's next husband turns up dead as well.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm
programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Million Dollar Gamble
programme.desc: Dave makes a dramatic pitch to return to Lynx Creek for a shot at the team's first-ever million-dollar season. But Casey must find gold fast as Jason is hit with a bombshell that could end their Arizona adventure before it begins.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Arizona Crush
programme.desc: In Arizona, Dave spots a clue that could be evidence of main channel gold before leaving for to an epic prospect in Alaska. But when Jason decides to move the crew off questionable pay, the pressure is on to hit their weekly target.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Captaincy
programme.desc: Danger lurks on the ship as Emily falls overboard and a faulty sluice box falls on Scott Foster's head.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Sweet Homestead Alabama
programme.desc: The Raneys face an emotional rescue of young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama. To save the legacy of an 8th generation family property, they must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Mississippi Mayhem

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Hidden Secrets!

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Bromance

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Bad Energy

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Matt/ Sarah
programme.desc: To afford his dream of becoming a pro-wrestler, Matt has reduced his spending to just $300 a month. Extreme Cheapskate Sarah saves on groceries by never leaving one of her family's catering events without leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Nobody Pays Retail
programme.desc: Lydia Abate scours the obituaries, then visits surviving family members in hopes of taking the deceased person's clothing off of their hands. Mason Roberts introduces his wife to his entire family of cheapskates.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Terence/ Greg
programme.desc: Terence and Greg cause friction when others rebel against their bare-bones budgets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: In Sickness and in Wealth
programme.desc: Extreme Cheapskates Karen and Barry cannot stand the idea of spending money. Whether it's frying breakfast on the car engine or pulling out their own tooth at home, no task is too big and no savings too small.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jordan/ Michael
programme.desc: Utah housewife Jordan manages to only spend $1400 a month for her family of five by rationing everything and asking her neighbors for their leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Home is Where the Cart Is

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The O'Briens

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Movie: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Three downtrodden working stiffs decide to launch their own business, but a slick investor stops them in their tracks. They hatch a half-baked scheme to kidnap the investor's son and demand a ransom, with which they can reclaim their business.

programme.title: Movie: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: A macho cop is forced to masquerade as a kindergarten teacher in order to locate a drug dealer's ex-wife.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Magic Mountain
programme.desc: Chris, Wes, Eric, and Alex hit the slopes. Eric and Wes perform chairlift magic. Plus, The Great Ramsini hits the laundromat and Wes makes an impossible golf shot.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Roadtrip to Whiskey Castle
programme.desc: The boys hit the road to visit a whiskey tasting at a castle. Road tricks and magic pit stops abound. Plus, The Great Ramsini visits the supermarket, Wes slingshots a balloon, and Alex's illusion shatters expectations.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Chris Redd Headlines
programme.desc: Funny man Chris Redd headlines as the always hilarious Donnell Rawlings jokes about his time in the military. Plus, Chanel Ali sets off new hair trends in the workplace.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ronnie Jordan Headlines
programme.desc: Headliner Ronnie Jordan brings the heat tonight and is joined by funny woman Jade Catta-Preta as she shares the secret to relationship success. Plus, Blaq Ron gets a salsa lesson.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Orlando Leyba Headlines
programme.desc: Orlando Leyba headlines. Plus, Donnell Rawlings tells a story about the time his bike was stolen, and Just Nesh breaks loose in the dressing room.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Clayton English
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Masters of Disasters
programme.desc: See a zombie terrorize the streets of Amsterdam, find out about the latest 'selfie shoe' craze and see why a councilman who left his mic on feels pretty crappy.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Comical Fools
programme.desc: Learn why playing with fire is still a bad idea, see who has the fastest Rubik's Cube hands underwater, and the latest on the dad bod craze that's taking over the world.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Bungling Boneheads
programme.desc: Discover why reading while roller blading and the ice bucket challenge don't always go as planned. Also, find out that it is possible to fall through a trampoline.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Show Me the Funny
programme.desc: Find out what part of the male anatomy you definitely don't want stuck in a bike wheel, see the world's largest whoopee cushion and witness an epic unicycle fail.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Popcorn Pants
programme.desc: Michael delivers a shock at a shipping store when wine tips over and gets bubble wrap tipsy. Then, at a popcorn shop, he dons the latest kernel fashions, and at a theater he stuns his helper with a trick that jumps off the screen.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Puppification
programme.desc: Michael blends juices with a sticker at an appliance store, and then reverses the food chain ay a pet shop. Later, at a doggy spa, a rejuvenation machine turns back time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Magic Mountain

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Movie: Friday After Next

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.desc: Charlotte plans to find a husband; Carrie's politician boyfriend has a surprising request.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Attack of the 5'10" Woman

programme.title: Sex and the City: Boy, Girl, Boy, Girl

programme.desc: Carrie faces a tough decision when she meets Aidan, who makes it clear that he can't be with a smoker. Charlotte is horrified by her boyfriend's kissing skills. Steve and Miranda fight over practising for a million-dollar basketball shot.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Are We Sluts?
programme.desc: Carrie wonders why her guy won't hit the sheets; Miranda discovers she has an STD.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Drama Queens

programme.desc: Carrie bumps into Big at a party; Samantha fears menopause; Miranda breaks up with Steve.

programme.desc: Charlotte prompts Trey to propose; Big encounters Carrie and Aidan at a furniture show.

programme.desc: Carrie's fling weighs on her conscience; Charlotte plays hardball over a pre-nup.

programme.desc: Carrie seeks advice about Big; Samantha's new guy wants her to be tested for AIDS.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Don't Ask, Don't Tell

programme.title: Sex and the City: Escape From New York
programme.desc: While visiting L.A., Samantha meets a model and Carrie meets Matthew McConaughey.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and Another City
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles, the girls head to the Playboy Mansion for a pool party.

programme.title: Movie: Bring It On: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Life is good for Britney Allen, making her the envy of all girls at Pacific Vista High School. All comes to a halt when her father's job moves them out of their posh neighbourhood forcing Britney to join the squad of her rival school.

programme.title: Movie: Bring It On
programme.desc: Two rival cheerleading squads literally turn cartwheels and more to make it to the top.

programme.title: Movie: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Two long-time best girlfriends are getting married. They wind up scheduling their weddings on the same day and their plans turn into a competition with each other. The friendship becomes a bitter rivalry over their dream weddings.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Guy travels to places where things are still done the old-fashioned way. In Oklahoma City, a steak house has been serving the same menu items for more than 80 years.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Loaded
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for the biggest and fullest loaded meals and flavours around.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: East Coast Eatin'
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri checks in on some favorite East Coast eats. His first stop is a neighborhood joint that's still dishin' out diner classics from a cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Dishes
programme.desc: Guy takes on unique eats. In Honolulu, a Jamaican joints serves up jerk chicken wings and goat curry. In Arlington, it's potato pancake stuffed with beef. And in Las Vegas, a taco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Southern and South of the Border
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into sandwiches, Southern eats and south-of-the-border specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Bites And Southern Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing some barbecue and Southern comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Shipped, Sweet & Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri makes Triple-D style takeout with DDD alums who join Guy and Hunter via video chat. On this menu, there's killer Cajun coming from Los Angeles, sweet and savory crepes out of Las Vegas and empanadas sent from Denver.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Everyday Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting the road and taking a detour to find some out-of-the-ordinary eats. In Chico, California, a Hawaiian-Asian fusion spot serving up righteous ramen and a fried chicken bao.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island Flavor
programme.desc: Guy's in Hawaii for an authentic taste of Oahu. In Waipahu, a family-run business is serving freshly made favorites right out of mom's cookbook.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Haunts
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's takin' a spin through the town favourites. In Chatham, N.J., the real deal Italian joint bakin' up some righteous fried chicken, arancini balls and the decadent sacred swine sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Surf and Turf
programme.desc: It's a mix of land and sea as Guy Fieri pops into a few favourite spots across the country. In Portland, Ore., a chef full of personality is still making people smile with seafood for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.desc: Guy looks at burgers and steaks in San Francisco and Cambridge.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Seafood
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing all her seafood secrets and pro tips, starting with her recipe for Cioppino, a satisfying one-pot stew with cod, shrimp, scallops and mussels.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Portable Food
programme.desc: It's food on the move with Ina Garten as she shares pro tips for perfect portable eats. She makes moist lemon poppy seed cake for an afternoon snack at work and tomato mozzarella pan bagnat.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Party Helpline
programme.desc: The Kitchen Helpline is answering summer party questions and sharing recipes like Geoffrey Zakarian's grilled seafood platter and Katie Lee's peach caprese with balsamic cherries.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Comfort Classics and Fruity Cocktails
programme.desc: Proving you can make any dish outside on a grill, Michael prepares a rich mac and cheese loaded with smoked ham with cream cheese, gouda and pecorino. He finishes off with a grilled apple crisp over their fire pit.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Clambake on the Grill
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a summertime seafood meal that's all about the prep and then letting the foil and grill do the work. He makes foil packets of Clams with Sausage and Peppers and, for dessert, Peaches with Mascarpone and Honey.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 3 Apps and a Cocktail
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has cocktail hour and a summer party on her mind. She puts her ranch kitchen spin on a BBQ shrimp cocktail, makes irresistible buffalo chicken meatball skewers, bakes bacon ranch cheesy bread and mixes up blueberry-basil limeade.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Ranch Cookout
programme.desc: Ree Drummond puts together a quick and easy ranch-style cookout. She makes super-fast Caribbean Burgers with Mango Slaw for a taste of the islands in Oklahoma, and her Sunshine Pasta Salad and Lemon Mustard Dressing is a colorful side dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Wedding on the Ranch
programme.desc: Join the guest list to the fabulous frontier wedding as Ree Drummond’s daughter Alex Drummond marries her college sweetheart Mauricio Scott.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Summer Vibes
programme.desc: Nothing screams summer party weekend like BBQ Shrimp, Michael Symon-style. Michael creates his delicious shrimp dish on the grill along with a side of creamed corn with lime and tangy tomatillo sauce.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Calexico Tailgate
programme.desc: When Guy Fieri can't make it to the stadium for a good tailgate party, he does the next best thing and invites his all-star chef buddies to cook and eat outside at his ranch.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Hometown Favorites
programme.desc: Captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson get to know their teams better through nostalgic challenges that inspire them to dig deep into their BBQ memory banks and challenge their ability to work together.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Shucking the Competition
programme.desc: French chefs Laurent Zirotti and Eric Damidot go head to head in the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Red, White and Bbq
programme.desc: Elvis Duran and Katie Lee are celebrating the birth of our nation by watching America's golden boy sweat in his own arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The View from the Top
programme.desc: Food Network's Michael Symon gets help from "The View's" Sunny Hostin as they try to cut Bobby Flay down to size. New York chef Pom Amaritnant duels with chef Troy Gagliardo from North Carolina for a chance to dethrone the king.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Off to the Races
programme.desc: Chef Josh Capon and sports reporter Carolyn Manno team up to make sure Bobby Flay doesn't try for a trick play. Haitian chef Jouvens Jean takes on Francophile and Seattle restaurateur Bruce Naftaly to beat Bobby at his own game.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: No Cake Walk
programme.desc: Three of Bobby Flay's friends unite to try and take him down. Sunny Anderson, Alex Guarnaschelli and Buddy Valastro do their best to take the cake.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Double Trouble
programme.desc: It's up to the dynamic duo of Daphne Oz and Damaris Phillips to decide who has the skill to paint Bobby Flay out of the picture as chef and artist Enrique Limardo goes up against Southwestern chef Jeff Smedstad in an all-out culinary battle.

programme.title: Around the Horn

programme.desc: Two rescued sea lions arrive at the aquarium, and trainers help prepare them for an upcoming eye surgery. The team travels to the Bahamas to research the effects of plastics in the ocean on sharks. The aquarium conducts a study to help wild beluga whales.

programme.title: The Zoo: Velcro the Incredible
programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: New Chick on the Block
programme.desc: A popular sea lion falls ill after ingesting a foreign object. The avian team devises a plan to increase the cock-of-the-rocks population. Endangered snakes are coupled for breeding, and Andean bear cubs meet their fans.

programme.title: The Zoo: Beloved Bugs
programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.title: The Zoo: Fawns Become Friends
programme.desc: Two sickly newborn fawns form an unbreakable bond while they are hand-reared by staff. Leopard Khazo gets a surprise that enhances her life, and tensions run high as the reptile staff attempts to collect blood from Cuban crocs.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.
